name: hardware-intelligence-system
description: Plan AI workstations, unified-memory nodes, cloud capacity, and phased machine fleets.

interface.shortDescription: Plan AI workstations, nodes, cloud, and TCO.
interface.longDescription: Turn workloads, budgets, models, media pipelines, and uptime needs into an evidence-labeled AI hardware and fleet plan with reusable Markdown, CSV, and JSON artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Plan an AI workstation and phased fleet for my workloads.
Compare a creator PC, unified-memory node, and cloud.
Estimate model fit, concurrency, power, and three-year TCO.
